{"_description":"Mermaid state diagram — state machine.","type":"mermaid","title":"mermaid state diagram","mermaid":"stateDiagram-v2
 [*] --> Still
 Still --> [*]
 Still --> Moving
 Moving --> Still
 Moving --> Crash
 Crash --> [*]"}
